evals.expected_output: Identifies missing required fields in widget.json, reports structured checklist.

assertions.name: checks-required-fields
assertions.text: Identifies missing or invalid required fields in widget.json (version, title, description, category, source/content)

assertions.name: reports-structured-output
assertions.text: Reports results in a structured format with categories (structure, schema, content, etc.)

evals.expected_output: Identifies hardcoded secrets in connectors.json, flags document.querySelector usage, reports security issues.

assertions.name: flags-hardcoded-secrets
assertions.text: Identifies hardcoded secrets or API keys in connectors.json and recommends get_secret()

assertions.name: flags-document-queryselector
assertions.text: Identifies document.querySelector usage and recommends sdk.$() for Shadow DOM

evals.expected_output: Identifies <html>, <head>, or <body> tags in content.html and explains it must be an HTML fragment.

assertions.name: flags-non-fragment-html
assertions.text: Identifies that content.html contains <html>, <head>, or <body> tags and must be an HTML fragment

evals.prompt: Run validation on all widgets in this repo
evals.expected_output: Validates all widgets found in the widgets/ directory, reports per-widget results.

assertions.name: discovers-all-widgets
assertions.text: Scans the widgets/ directory to find all widgets rather than asking which one to validate

assertions.name: validates-each-widget
assertions.text: Runs validation checks against each discovered widget and reports results per widget
